pve_actions.name: Split Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140.
Additional Effect: Increases Heat Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Slug Shot
pve_actions.combo_from: Split Shot or Heated Split Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Combo Action: Split Shot or Heated Split Shot
Combo Potency: 210
Combo Bonus: Increases Heat Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Hot Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 240.
Additional Effect: Increases Battery Gauge by 20
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Reassemble
pve_actions.effect:
Guarantees that next weaponskill is a critical direct hit.
Duration: 5s
Increases damage dealt when under an effect that raises critical hit rate or direct hit rate.
This action does not affect damage over time effects.
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Gauss Round
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 130.
Maximum Charges: 3

pve_actions.name: Spread Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 110 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Increases Heat Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Clean Shot
pve_actions.combo_from: Slug Shot or Heated Slug Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Combo Action: Slug Shot or Heated Slug Shot
Combo Potency: 270
Combo Bonus: Increases Heat Gauge by 5
Combo Bonus: Increases Battery Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Hypercharge
pve_actions.effect:
Grants 5 stacks of Overheated, each stack allowing the execution of Blazing Shot or Auto Crossbow.
Duration: 10s
Overheated Effect: Increases the potency of single-target weaponskills by 20
Heat Gauge Cost: 50
Overheated effect only applicable to machinist job actions.

pve_actions.name: Heat Blast
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200.
Additional Effect: Reduces the recast time of both Gauss Round and Ricochet by 15s
Can only be executed when firearm is Overheated.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Rook Autoturret
pve_actions.effect:
Deploys a single-target battle turret which attacks using Volley Fire, dealing damage with a potency of 35.
Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment, up to a maximum of 75.
Battery Gauge Cost: 50
Duration: 9s
Consumes Battery Gauge upon execution.
Shuts down when time expires or upon execution of Rook Overdrive.
Shares a recast timer with Rook Overdrive.

pve_actions.name: Rook Overdrive
pve_actions.effect:
Orders the rook autoturret to use Rook Overload.
Rook Overload Potency: 160
Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment, up to a maximum of 320.
The rook autoturret shuts down after execution. If this action is not used manually while the rook autoturret is active, it will be triggered automatically immediately before shutting down.
Shares a recast timer with Rook Autoturret.

pve_actions.name: Rook Overload
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 160.
Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment, up to a maximum of 320.
The rook autoturret shuts down after execution. If this action is not used manually while the rook autoturret is active, it will be triggered automatically immediately before shutting down.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.

pve_actions.name: Wildfire
pve_actions.effect:
Covers target's body in a slow-burning pitch. Action is changed to Detonator for the duration of the effect.
Deals damage when time expires or upon executing Detonator.
Potency is increased by 240 for each of your own weaponskills you land prior to the end of the effect.
Can be stacked up to 6 times.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Detonator
pve_actions.effect:
Ends the effect of Wildfire, dealing damage to the target.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Wildfire.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Wildfire changes to Detonator when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Ricochet
pve_actions.effect:
Deals damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 130 for the first enemy, and 30% less for all remaining enemies.
Maximum Charges: 3

pve_actions.name: Auto Crossbow
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Can only be executed when firearm is Overheated.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Heated Split Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 220.
Additional Effect: Increases Heat Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Tactician
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by self and nearby party members by 15%.
Duration: 15s
Effect cannot be stacked with bard's Troubadour or dancer's Shield Samba.

pve_actions.name: Drill
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 660.
Maximum Charges: 2
Shares a recast timer with Bioblaster.

pve_actions.name: Heated Slug Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140.
Combo Action: Heated Split Shot
Combo Potency: 320
Combo Bonus: Increases Heat Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Dismantle
pve_actions.effect:
Lowers target's damage dealt by 10%.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Heated Clean Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 160.
Combo Action: Heated Slug Shot
Combo Potency: 420
Combo Bonus: Increases Heat Gauge by 5
Combo Bonus: Increases Battery Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Barrel Stabilizer
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Hypercharged.
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Full Metal Machinist
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while in combat.

pve_actions.name: Blazing Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 240.
Additional Effect: Reduces the recast time of both Double Check and Checkmate by 15s
Can only be executed when firearm is Overheated.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Flamethrower
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers damage over time to all enemies in a cone before you.
Potency: 120
Duration: 10s
Effect ends upon using another action or moving (including facing a different direction).
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills upon execution. Cannot be executed during the cooldown of weaponskills.

pve_actions.name: Bioblaster
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 50 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Damage over time
Potency: 50
Duration: 15s
Maximum Charges: 2
Shares a recast timer with Drill.

pve_actions.name: Air Anchor
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 660.
Additional Effect: Increases Battery Gauge by 20
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Automaton Queen
pve_actions.effect:
Deploys an Automaton Queen to fight at your side.
Potency of Automaton Queen actions increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment.
Battery Gauge Cost: 50
Duration: 12s
Consumes Battery Gauge upon execution.
Shuts down when time expires or upon execution of Queen Overdrive.
Shares a recast timer with Queen Overdrive.

pve_actions.name: Queen Overdrive
pve_actions.effect:
Orders the Automaton Queen to use Pile Bunker.
Pile Bunker Potency: 340
Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment, up to a maximum of 680.
The Automaton Queen shuts down after execution. If this action is not used manually while the Automaton Queen is active, it will be triggered automatically immediately before shutting down.
Shares a recast timer with Automaton Queen.

pve_actions.name: Arm Punch
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120.
Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment, up to a maximum of 240.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.

pve_actions.name: Roller Dash
pve_actions.effect:
Rushes target and delivers an attack with a potency of 240.
Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment, up to a maximum of 480.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.

pve_actions.name: Pile Bunker
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 340.
Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment, up to a maximum of 680.
If this action is not used manually while the Automaton Queen is active, it will be triggered automatically immediately before shutting down.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.

pve_actions.name: Scattergun
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 130 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Increases Heat Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Crowned Collider
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 390.
Potency increases as Battery Gauge exceeds required cost at time of deployment, up to a maximum of 780.
The Automaton Queen shuts down after execution. If this action is not used manually while the Automaton Queen is active, it will be triggered automatically immediately before shutting down.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.

pve_actions.name: Chain Saw
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 660 for the first enemy, and 25% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases Battery Gauge by 20
Additional Effect: Grants Excavator Ready
Duration: 30s
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Double Check
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 180 for the first enemy, and 30% less for all remaining enemies.
Maximum Charges: 3

pve_actions.name: Checkmate
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 180 for the first enemy, and 30% less for all remaining enemies.
Maximum Charges: 3

pve_actions.name: Excavator
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 660 for the first enemy, and 25% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases Battery Gauge by 20
Can only be executed while under the effect of Excavator Ready.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Chain Saw changes to Excavator when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Full Metal Field
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a critical direct hit to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 900 for the first enemy, and 25% less for all remaining enemies.
Damage dealt is increased when under an effect that raises critical hit rate or direct hit rate.
This action is not affected by Reassemble.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Full Metal Machinist.

pve_actions.name: Leg Graze
pve_actions.effect:
Afflicts target with Heavy +40%.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Second Wind
pve_actions.effect:
Instantly restores own HP.
Cure Potency: 800

pve_actions.name: Foot Graze
pve_actions.effect:
Binds target.
Duration: 10s
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.
Target unbound if damage taken.

pve_actions.name: Peloton
pve_actions.effect:
Increases movement speed of self and nearby party members.
Duration: 30s
Effect ends when enmity is generated. Has no effect in battle.

pve_actions.name: Head Graze
pve_actions.effect: Interrupts the use of a target's action.

pve_actions.name: Arm's Length
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects.
Duration: 6s
Additional Effect: When you are struck by a physical attack, the striker will be afflicted with Slow +20%
Duration: 15s

traits.name: Increased Action Damage
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and autoturret damage by 10%.

traits.name: Increased Action Damage II
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and autoturret damage by 20%.

traits.name: Split Shot Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Split Shot to Heated Split Shot.

traits.name: Slug Shot Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Slug Shot to Heated Slug Shot.

traits.name: Clean Shot Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Clean Shot to Heated Clean Shot.

traits.name: Heat Blast Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Heat Blast to Blazing Shot.

traits.name: Charged Action Mastery
traits.effect: Allows a third charge of Gauss Round and Ricochet.

traits.name: Hot Shot Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Hot Shot to Air Anchor.

traits.name: Enhanced Wildfire
traits.effect: Improves Wildfire's potency increase for landing weaponskills to 240.

traits.name: Promotion
traits.effect: Upgrades Rook Autoturret and Rook Overdrive to Automaton Queen and Queen Overdrive respectively.

traits.name: Spread Shot Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Spread Shot to Scattergun.

traits.name: Enhanced Reassemble
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Reassemble.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Marksman's Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Heated Split Shot to 200, Heated Slug Shot to 120, and Heated Clean Shot to 120.

traits.name: Queen's Gambit
traits.effect: After executing Pile Bunker, the Automaton Queen will also execute Crowned Collider.

traits.name: Enhanced Tactician
traits.effect: Reduces Tactician recast time to 90 seconds.

traits.name: Double-barrel Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Gauss Round to Double Check and Ricochet to Checkmate.

traits.name: Enhanced Multiweapon
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Drill and Bioblaster.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Marksman's Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Auto Crossbow to 180, Heated Split Shot to 220, Drill to 660, Heated Slug Shot to 140, Heated Clean Shot to 160, Blazing Shot to 240, Air Anchor to 660, and Chain Saw to 660.

traits.name: Enhanced Multiweapon II
traits.effect:
Grants Excavator Ready upon executing Chain Saw.
Duration: 30s
Chain Saw changes to Excavator while under the effect of Excavator Ready.

traits.name: Enhanced Tactician II
traits.effect: Improves Tactician's damage reduction effect to 15%.

traits.name: Enhanced Barrel Stabilizer
traits.effect:
Grants Full Metal Machinist upon executing Barrel Stabilizer.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Second Wind
traits.effect: Increases the healing potency of Second Wind to 800.
